results.rendered_html: pradakṣiṇit adv. so v. a. pradakṣiṇam. pradakṣiṇidabhi gṛṇanti kāravaḥ  ṚV. 2,43,1 . 3,19,2 . samu priyā āvavṛtransadāya pradakṣiṇidabhi somāsa indram 32,15 . 4,6,3 . 5,60,1 . śuṣṇaṃ pari pradakṣiṇidviśvāyave ni śiśnathaḥ 10,22,14 .
